description: Ultra-advanced SERP deep analysis (SerpInspector): Fix pages returning 0 word count, add per-competitor keyword density analysis, add TF-IDF keyword extraction, add readability metrics, add internal/external link analysis, add response time measurement. Also add a dedicated single-competitor full analysis UI where user enters a URL and keyword and gets a complete competitor breakdown.
steps: 1. Enhance viraseo/includes/Features/SerpInspector.php `analyze_direct()` method: (a) Add multiple User-Agent rotation for better scraping success. (b) Add retry logic with different headers when first attempt fails (gets 0 words). (c) Add a proxy-based fallback using the ai_curl_proxy setting when direct fetch fails. (d) Extract more metrics: response_time (ms from fetch), canonical URL, og:title, og:description, robots meta, content_type detection (article/product/landing), reading_level estimate, keyword density for the target keyword, top 10 frequent words/bigrams (TF analysis), table count, video embeds, FAQ section detection, word count per heading section. (e) Improve body content extraction to handle more JS-rendered page patterns (check for data-content attributes, noscript fallback content, JSON-LD article body).

2. Add new AJAX endpoint `viraseo_serp_inspect_full` in SerpInspector for full single-competitor analysis: takes `url` + `keyword` params. Returns all the enhanced metrics from step 1 PLUS keyword-specific analysis: how many times keyword appears in title/H1/H2/content/URL/meta, keyword prominence score, and comparison recommendation text.

3. Add new AJAX endpoint `viraseo_serp_competitor_analysis` that takes an `analysis_id` and does ALL 10 competitors at once (batch deep inspect), saving results to the `viraseo_serp_competitors` table. Add new columns to the competitors table in Schema.php: `internal_links`, `external_links`, `response_time`, `canonical_url`, `has_faq`, `has_video`, `has_table`, `reading_level`, `top_keywords` (JSON), `meta_title`, `meta_desc`. Update `ajax_deep_save` to persist all new metrics.

4. Update viraseo/templates/admin/serp.php: Add a new section below the keyword input for 'Dedicated Competitor Analysis' (تحلیل اختصاصی رقیب) with fields for URL and target keyword, plus a button to run the full analysis. Also add a button next to the existing deep analysis button for the new batch competitor analysis.

5. Update viraseo/assets/js/admin.js SERP section: (a) Add handler for dedicated competitor analysis button - calls `viraseo_serp_inspect_full` and renders a rich detailed card with all metrics. (b) Improve the existing per-row click handler to show the enhanced metrics. (c) Add handler for batch competitor analysis. (d) Show a note when word_count is 0 with the JS-rendered page detection message. (e) Render keyword density info and top keywords for each competitor.
6. Update viraseo/includes/Database/Schema.php to add new columns to `viraseo_serp_competitors` table for the enhanced metrics.
7. Update viraseo/assets/css/admin.css with styles for the new competitor analysis cards and dedicated analysis section.
acceptance_criteria: php -l passes on all modified PHP files
SerpInspector has retry logic with different user agents

SerpInspector extracts 15+ metrics per page (word_count, headings, images, links, response_time, canonical, robots, FAQ detection, video, tables, top_keywords, reading_level, meta_title, meta_desc, keyword_density)
New dedicated competitor analysis endpoint accepts URL + keyword and returns keyword-specific metrics
SERP template has a new dedicated competitor analysis section with URL and keyword inputs
Schema.php adds new columns to serp_competitors table
findings: All verification passes. SerpInspector now has 6 UA rotation, retry logic with proxy fallback via Dashboard::get('ai_curl_proxy'), extracts 20+ metrics. New AJAX endpoints: viraseo_serp_inspect_full (URL+keyword), viraseo_serp_competitor_analysis (batch). Schema updated with 11 new columns. JS/CSS updated with dedicated competitor analysis UI section and enhanced per-row detail view.
